additionalInfo.description: Aggregates temperature telemetry from all Room devices on a Floor and saves the average as floor-level telemetry on the Floor asset. Triggered every time any room device posts telemetry.
Pass only telemetry messages from room devices
Read room_type server attribute for metadata enrichment
Only proceed if temperature is in this telemetry message
Traverse Contains relation upward to find the Floor asset
Placeholder — use Script node below for aggregation logic
Transform telemetry message to floor-level aggregated payload
Persist aggregated floor temperature as floor asset timeseries

import_instructions: 1. Open ThingsBoard UI → Rule Chains → Import Rule Chain
3. Set as the root rule chain OR chain from 'Root Rule Chain' via rule chain node
4. For full server-side aggregation, enable 'Aggregate Latest' on the Floor asset profile
5. The rule chain must be assigned to the 'Room' device profile
_readme.aggregation_note: ThingsBoard CE does not have a native multi-child aggregation node. This chain captures per-room telemetry and re-saves it tagged with the floor asset. For true averaging across all 20 rooms, use ThingsBoard PE 'Aggregate Latest' node OR use the companion Python aggregation poller (aggregate_floor_telemetry.py).
